name: AAA Pawnbrokers of North Miami
description_short: AAA Pawnbrokers of North Miami buys, sells, and pawns gold, jewelry, firearms, and general merchandise. Multi-award-winning shop open 6 days weekly with on-site concealed carry instruction.
description_long:
AAA Pawnbrokers of North Miami has established itself as a specialized pawn shop in North Miami, Florida, focusing on high-value collateral including precious metals, jewelry, and firearms. Located at 14010 West Dixie Highway, the business operates as a traditional pawn operation where customers can borrow against items of value or sell merchandise outright. The shop has won multiple "Best Pawn Shop" awards and maintains active community engagement through its website and direct phone/email communication channels.

The company's core services center on three primary merchandise categories: gold and silver buying/pawning/selling with an emphasis on watches; firearm transactions including buying, pawning, selling, and trading; and general product inventory that rotates weekly. Beyond traditional pawn operations, AAA Pawnbrokers distinguishes itself by offering on-site Florida Concealed Weapons Permit (CWP) training courses taught by in-house instructors. The course covers firearm safety fundamentals, Florida concealed carry laws, reciprocal carry states, Stand Your Ground doctrine, and Castle Doctrine principles. Upon completion, students receive a complete application packet including CWP forms, fingerprint cards, and directions to the Doral office for permit processing.

What sets this pawnbroker apart is its specialized expertise in firearms combined with legitimate CWP education—a relatively uncommon service combination in the pawn industry. The business emphasizes customer service quality, noting they are "open 6 days a week 9am–6pm" with "fast and friendly service." Multiple award mentions suggest consistent local recognition, though the basis for these awards is not detailed on the website.

Honestly, this is a standard pawn shop with a firearms specialty and added value through CWP training. Customers should understand that pawn loans carry typical transaction costs and interest rates (not disclosed on website), and firearm purchases/sales involve full federal and state compliance requirements. The website contains unrelated spam content (Hungarian casino text, Irish gambling platform references) that suggests website maintenance issues, which may reflect on overall business professionalism. No information is provided regarding loan terms, interest rates, fees, or customer reviews.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: Specialized expertise in firearms buying, selling, pawning, and trading with diverse inventory
On-site Florida Concealed Weapons Permit courses taught by in-house instructors—eliminates need to find external training
Multi-award winner ('Best Pawn Shop' multiple years, 'Best of North Miami Award')—suggests customer satisfaction and local reputation
Three distinct merchandise categories (gold/jewelry, firearms, general products) provides varied collateral options
Extended hours 6 days weekly 9am–6pm accommodates working customers
Complete CWP application packet provided after course completion with office directions
Multiple contact methods available (phone, email, website) for customer convenience
cons: No loan terms, interest rates, or fee structure disclosed on website—customers cannot comparison shop before visiting
Website contains substantial spam content (Hungarian casino promotions, unrelated gambling platform links) suggesting poor website maintenance and professionalism concerns
No customer reviews, testimonials, or specific details about award criteria despite multiple award claims
Firearm inventory shown as 'some of our selection now' with limited transparency into stock availability or pricing
No information on what qualifies as acceptable collateral for non-jewelry/non-firearm items, creating uncertainty for general merchandise pawning
best_for: Firearm owners in North Miami seeking quick cash loans against firearms with local expertise and compliance assurance
Florida residents pursuing concealed carry permits who want training, application guidance, and fingerprinting coordination in one location
Gold and jewelry sellers/pawners wanting specialized appraisal and valuation for precious metals and watches
Customers needing immediate liquidity who can visit the physical location and prefer traditional pawn transactions over installment loans
diagnosis: AAA Pawnbrokers is best for North Miami-area residents needing quick collateral-based loans or merchandise sales, particularly those with firearms or precious metals, and Florida gun owners seeking reputable CWP training. Primary caveat: the company does not publicly disclose loan terms, interest rates, or fees—essential information for evaluating whether their pawn loans are competitively priced, requiring in-person inquiry before committing to any transaction.
services: Florida Concealed Weapons Permit training courses
Concealed carry law and safety education
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
address: 14010 W Dixie Hwy, North Miami, FL 33161
